versions.version_description: This tab is for Dynamite. The chords were inspired from "The Groovy Guitar Dude's" YouTube tutorial.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]

[tab]e|---------------------------------------------------------------------------|
B|-------2--0---------------------------------2--0---------------------------|
G|-------------2--1--1------------------------------2--1---------------------|
D|---2------------------4--(4)-2-2---2--2-2---------------2--4--(4)--2-------|
A|---------------------------------------------------------------------------|
E|---------------------------------------------------------------------------|[/tab]

'Cause I, I, I'm in the stars tonight

So watch me bring the fire and set the night alight

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
  Shoes on, get up in the morn'[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Dm[/ch]
Cup of milk, let's rock and roll[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
  King Kong, kick the drum[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]
Rolling on like a Rolling Stone[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
  Sing song when I'm walking home[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Dm[/ch]
Jump up to the top, LeBron[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
  Ding-dong, call me on my phone[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]
Ice tea and a game of ping pong[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab] [ch]Am[/ch]                                      [ch]Dm[/ch]
This is getting heavy, can you hear the bass boom? I'm ready[/tab]
[tab] [ch]G[/ch]                                   [ch]C[/ch]
Life is sweet as honey, yeah, this beat cha-ching like money[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Am[/ch]                  [ch]Dm[/ch]
Disco overload, I'm into that, I'm good to go[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]
I'm diamond, you know I glow up[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
 Hey, so let's go[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]      [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]Dm[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]
'Cause I, I, I'm in the stars tonight[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]Dm[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
So watch me bring the fire and set the night alight (Hey)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                   [ch]Dm[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]
Shining through the city with a little funk and soul[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]Dm[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
So I'ma light it up like dynamite, woah[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                                 [ch]Dm[/ch]
  Bring a friend, join the crowd, whoever wanna come along[/tab]
[tab] [ch]G[/ch]                           [ch]C[/ch]
Word up, talk the talk, just move like we off the wall[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                                      [ch]Dm[/ch]
  Day or night, the sky's alight, so we dance to the break of dawn[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                            [ch]C[/ch]
Ladies and gentlemen, I got the medicine so you should keep ya eyes on the ball, huh[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab] [ch]Am[/ch]                                      [ch]Dm[/ch]
This is getting heavy, can you hear the bass boom? I'm ready[/tab]
[tab] [ch]G[/ch]                                   [ch]C[/ch]

Disco overload, I'm into that, I'm good to go[/tab]

I'm diamond, you know I glow up[/tab]

 Hey, so let's go[/tab]
